title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: June 27, 2024
summary: June 27, 2024: The Arctic sea ice has continued to decrease this week at a greater rate of 5.31% (as opposed to last week’s decrease rate of 2.93%), from the level on 06/20/2024 of 10.663 M km 2 to 10.097 M km 2 for this week. Plot Compiled by: Howard J. Diamond, PhD; Climate Science Program Manager...
